sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى شَرِكَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ لِإِجْرَاءِ مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je otišao u veliku firmu na razgovor za posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed went to a large company for a job interview.

sentences.arabic: ارْتَدَى مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَوَصَلَ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Nosio je formalnu odjeću i stigao je na vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: He wore formal clothes and arrived on time.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَهُ الْمُدِيرُ عَنْ خِبْرَتِهِ السَّابِقَةِ وَمَهَارَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor ga je pitao o njegovom prethodnom iskustvu i vještinama.
sentences.translationEn: The manager asked him about his previous experience and skills.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ أَحْمَدُ عَنْ جَمِيعِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَأَدَبٍ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je na sva pitanja odgovorio samouvjereno i učtivo.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed answered all the questions with confidence and politeness.
